Fields.Name: Disable Param: Network Test Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the NT version or mark the ones to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Release Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the product version or mark the items to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Attack ID
Fields.Description: Set the attack parameters that are applied when this bullet impacts a victim.

Fields.Name: Particle ID: Projectile
Fields.Description: SFX ID before acceleration. If the SFX ID after acceleration is -1, this SFX will continue to fly even after acceleration.

Fields.Name: Particle ID: Impact
Fields.Description: Impact SFX ID. -1 means it does not occur.

Fields.Name: Particle ID: Repel
Fields.Description: SFX ID when repelling projectile. -1 means it does not occur.

Fields.Name: Duration
Fields.Description: Time for projectile to exist in flight (-1 is infinite). In seconds.

Fields.Name: Attenuation Range
Fields.Description:
If the projectile's flight distance exceeds this value, the attenuation set by other parameters will be applied. The distance measurement method changes depending on the value of 'Application of curve correction'.

If 'Application of curved shot correction' is OFF, the travel distance of the bullet is taken as flight distance.

If 'Apply curve correction' is ON, the distance on the horizontal plane from the bullet's firing position to the bullet's current position is the distance traveled.

Fields.Name: Max Random Duration Value
Fields.Description: Random maximum value added to duration

Fields.Name: Gravity: In Range
Fields.Description: Gravity applied downward to the projectile when within range. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Gravity: Out of Range
Fields.Description: Gravity applied downward to the projectile when outside of range. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Homing Stop Range
Fields.Description: The distance at which the projectile homing will stop being applied.

Fields.Name: Initial Velocity
Fields.Description: Initial speed of projectile.

Fields.Name: Acceleration: In Range
Fields.Description: Acceleration whilst projectile is within distance threshold. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Acceleration: Out of Range
Fields.Description: Acceleration whilst projectile is beyond the distance threshold. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Maximum Velocity
Fields.Description: The maximum speed of the bullet. In metres per second.

Fields.Name: Minimum Velocity
Fields.Description: The minimum speed of the bullet. In metres per second.

Fields.Name: Acceleration Start Delay
Fields.Description: The delay before the projectile will start accelerating. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Homing Start Distance
Fields.Description: The distance at which projectile homing will start to be applied.

Fields.Name: Use Map-only Hit
Fields.Description: If ON, separate hits will be generated for the opponent character and the opponent map. If OFF, use the same hit against the character and against the map.

Fields.Name: Use Path Finding for Homing
Fields.Description: If ON, use navigation volume path search for homing target

Fields.Name: Generated Assets follow Bullet
Fields.Description: If ON, then dynamic assets generated by the bullet will follow the bullet.

Fields.Name: Generated Pulse Armor follow Bullet
Fields.Description: If ON, then pulse armor asset generated by the bullet will follow the bullet.

Fields.Name: Inherit Shotgun Index from Parent
Fields.Description: If ON, then shotgun index will be inherited from parent bullet.

Fields.Name: Penetrates Pulse Armor
Fields.Description: If ON, passes through Pulse Armor

Fields.Name: Sync Hit Erase
Fields.Description: Should I perform erase synchronization (synchronization of bullet state transitions due to impact and lifespan)?

Fields.Name: Use FSDP
Fields.Description: If there is packet loss instead of guaranteeing arrival, a blockage will occur.

Fields.Name: Homing Correction Axis
Fields.Description: Axis selection for homing

Fields.Name: Homing Correction Angle
Fields.Description: Only the axial component of the homing is changed. -1 does not change

Fields.Name: Hit Radius: Initial
Fields.Description: The initial radius of the hitbox.

Fields.Name: Hit Radius: Maximum
Fields.Description: The maximum radius of the hitbox, the duration for the hitbox to change from initial to max radius is determined by spreadTime. (If -1, radius is same as initial hitbox radius).

Fields.Name: Hit Radius: Initial (Map-only)
Fields.Description: Initial radius of the hitbox. For map-only hit.

Fields.Name: Hit Radius: Max (Map-only)
Fields.Description: Maximum radius of the hitbox, time hitbox changes from initial to max is determined by spreadTime. (If -1, radius is same as initial hitbox radius). For map-only hit.

Fields.Name: Hit Radius: Spread Time
Fields.Description: The duration it takes for hitbox radius to grow from initial value to max value. If 0, only the initial radius is used. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Hit Radius: Expansion Delay
Fields.Description: The duration from the projectile landing to the start of hit radius expansion (if 0, it expands immediately).

Fields.Name: Homing Correction Offset
Fields.Description: If set to 0, the projectile will track with perfect accuracy. Otherwise, the target location is offset by this amount in the direction to victim is moving.

Fields.Name: Damage Application Interval
Fields.Description: The interval at which damage can be applied by this bullet to a victim. 0 means it will only ever apply once.

Fields.Name: External Force Modifier
Fields.Description: The external force modifier to apply to the projectile in the direction of shooting (Y-axis is removed) based on map factor.

Fields.Name: Shooter SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: The SpEffect applied to owner of projectile upon being emitted.

Fields.Name: Funnel Think ID
Fields.Description: The think parameters used by the funnel to search for the target (e.g. soulmass).

Fields.Name: Hit Bullet ID
Fields.Description: The bullet to generate when the projectile expires, or conditionally according to some launchConditionType values.

Fields.Name: Target SpEffect ID: 0
Fields.Description: The SpEffect to apply when the projectile hits target.

Fields.Name: Target SpEffect ID: 1
Fields.Description: SpEffect to apply when the projectile hits target.

Fields.Name: Target SpEffect ID: 2
Fields.Description: SpEffect to apply when the projectile hits target.

Fields.Name: Target SpEffect ID: 3
Fields.Description: SpEffect to apply when the projectile hits target.

Fields.Name: Target SpEffect ID: 4
Fields.Description: SpEffect to apply when the projectile hits target.

Fields.Name: Number of Shots
Fields.Description: The number of projectiles produced per emitter interval.

Fields.Name: Homing Strength
Fields.Description: The amount of tracking correction made each second, affecting the speed the projectile faces the victim. In degrees per second.

Fields.Name: Horizontal Firing Angle
Fields.Description: Specify the horizontal angle at which the projectile should be fired, offset from the emitter origin. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Horizontal Firing Angle Interval
Fields.Description: When firing multiple projectiles, specify the horizontal angle interval at which to fire (Y-axis). In degrees.

Fields.Name: Vertical Firing Angle Interval
Fields.Description: When firing multiple projectiles, specify the vertical angle interval at which to fire (X-axis). Positive values angle upwards, negative values angle downwards. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff %: Kinetic
Fields.Description: After passing attenuation distance, Kinetic damage falls off by this % every second.

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff %: Energy
Fields.Description: After passing attenuation distance, Energy damage falls off by this % every second.

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff %: Explosive
Fields.Description: After passing attenuation distance, Explosive damage falls off by this % every second.

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff %: Coral
Fields.Description: After passing attenuation distance, Coral damage falls off by this % every second.

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff %: Stamina
Fields.Description: After passing attenuation distance, Stamina damage falls off by this % every second.

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff %: Knockback
Fields.Description: After passing attenuation distance, knockback falls off by this % every second.

Fields.Name: Vertical Firing Angle
Fields.Description: Specify the vertical angle of the projectile that should be fired. Positive values angle upwards, negative values angle downwards. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Maximum Tracking Angle
Fields.Description: The maximum angle the bullet's initial direction can change to face towards player locked-on target or AI focused enemy. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Character Penetration Type
Fields.Description: Determines penetration type upon impacting a character.

Fields.Name: Previous Movement Direction Addition %
Fields.Description: The ratio to add the previous movement direction to the current direction when the sliding bullet hits the wall.

Fields.Name: Live Bullet Attribute
Fields.Description: Live bullet attribute to set for attack

Fields.Name: Special Attribute
Fields.Description: Special attributes to set for attacks

Fields.Name: Attack Presentation Type
Fields.Description: Specify the particles and sounds to apply for the attack against the victim.

Fields.Name: Attack Presentation: Material
Fields.Description: Specify the material to apply for the attack against the victim.

Fields.Name: Does Impact Particle follow on Multi-Hit
Fields.Description: Should the location be tracked when there is a multi-hit (assuming that resident SFX is used)

Fields.Name: Max Missle Lock Count
Fields.Description: Maximum number of missile locks

Fields.Name: Launch Condition Type
Fields.Description: Conditions required for HitBulletID to generate upon impact or expiration.

Fields.Name: Follow Type
Fields.Description: Affects bullet position and behavior.

Fields.Name: Emitter Position Type
Fields.Description: Where bullet appears when created.

Fields.Name: Persistent Hit Particles
Fields.Description: If ON, the projectile SFX will remain stuck in the victim it it collides.

Fields.Name: Allow Continuous Hit
Fields.Description: If ON, the projectile will hit continously upon impact.

Fields.Name: Penetrate Map
Fields.Description: If ON, the projectile will pass through collision and map pieces.

Fields.Name: Hit Both Teams
Fields.Description: If ON, the projectile will collide with both victim and owner team types.

Fields.Name: Use Shared Hit List
Fields.Description: If ON, multiple projectile from the same emitter that collide with a victim will count as one projectile in terms of updating the damage interval.

Fields.Name: Use Multiple Dummy Polygons for Emit
Fields.Description: If ON, multiple dummy polygons with shared ID can be used for emitting the projectile.

Fields.Name: Apply Curvature Correction
Fields.Description: Set whether to apply curvature correction. In addition, when it is OFF, the 'effective range' is determined using the distance traveled by the bullet as the flying distance. When ON, the 'effective firing range' is determined using the distance on the horizontal plane from the bullet's firing position to the bullet's current position as the flying distance.

Fields.Name: Is Hit Force Magic
Fields.Description: If ON, this projectile can be deflected by projectiles with attachEffectType set to 1.

Fields.Name: Block Hit Particle Emit on Water Collision
Fields.Description: If ON, do not emit the hit particle if the projectile hits the water surface

Fields.Name: Penetrate Water Collision
Fields.Description: If ON, the projectile will pass through water collision.

Fields.Name: Is Hit Dark Force Magic
Fields.Description: If ON, this projectile can be deflected by projectiles with attachEffectType set to 3.

Fields.Name: Child Bullet Inherits Parent Position
Fields.Description: If ON, the sub-bullet spawn position will be the same as the parent bullet when a proximity fuze hits. If OFF, the position is corrected according to the amount of movement (turn OFF when a bullet moving at high speed hits the target)

Fields.Name: Ignore Decals on Expiration
Fields.Description: Ignore decal display if bullet expires.

Fields.Name: Automatic Tracking when Unlocked
Fields.Description: Whether to automatically follow when not locked on

Fields.Name: Is Emitter Source Synced with Bullet
Fields.Description: In the case of a synchronously generated bullet, the emitter attitude at the time of synchronization is used without recalculating the attitude due to the dummy polygon position when the bullet is generated.

Fields.Name: Do Emitted Bullets Lock-on to Target
Fields.Description: If the bullets are created via emitter, do they fly towards the target? If it is OFF, it will fly towards the parent position.

Fields.Name: Maintain Bullet Direction before Homing
Fields.Description: Should the warhead direction be maintained until guidance begins? Used to prevent the warhead direction from falling due to gravity immediately after launch.

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff %: Dark
Fields.Description: After passing attenuation distance, Dark damage falls off by this % every second.

Fields.Name: Particle Deletion Type: Impact
Fields.Description: Bullet SFX extinction type when landing or repelling.

Fields.Name: Particle Deletion Type: Expiration
Fields.Description: Bullet SFX extinction type at the end of life

Fields.Name: Firing: Target Offset (Y-Axis)
Fields.Description: Vertical offset of impact position. Shifts the target position up and down during firing and homing. In metres.

Fields.Name: Firing: Max Random Angle (Y-Axis)
Fields.Description: Upper limit of launch angle random number (0 to 360). In degrees.

Fields.Name: Firing: Max Random Angle (X-Axis)
Fields.Description: Upper limit of launch angle random number (0 to 360). In degrees.

Fields.Name: Interval Emitter: Bullet ID
Fields.Description: Bullet ID used when creating bullets at regular intervals

Fields.Name: Interval Emitter: Minimum Creation Time
Fields.Description: Minimum interval to create bullets at regular intervals (0 to n)

Fields.Name: Interval Emitter: Maximum Creation Time
Fields.Description: Maximum interval to create bullets at regular intervals (0 to n)

Fields.Name: Interval Emitter: Prediction Shoot Observe Time
Fields.Description: Average speed observation time of predicted shooting function (function is invalid if 0 to 40)

Fields.Name: Interval Emitter: Initial Delay
Fields.Description: Waiting time to start making bullets at regular intervals

Fields.Name: Particle Posture Type
Fields.Description: Set the initial attitude of an SFX or sub-bullet created from a bullet

Fields.Name: Inherit Particles from Parent Bullet
Fields.Description: Inherits the SFX of the parent bullet. Ignore SFXID set for child bullets.

Fields.Name: Inherit Speed from Parent Bullet
Fields.Description: Inherits the speed of the timing when child bullets are replaced. Ignore the velocity set for the child bullet.

Fields.Name: Inherit Following Assets from Parent Bullet
Fields.Description: If there is an asset that is being followed, it will be passed on to the child bullet.

Fields.Name: Fire Sequentially even when Firing Simultaneously
Fields.Description: When firing sequentially using multiple dummy polys, are bullets fired at the same time considered to be fired sequentially?

Fields.Name: Apply Camera Rumble without Target
Fields.Description: Whether the camera shakes when a character other than the character the camera is looking at shoots

Fields.Name: Consume Ammunition for Simultaneous Shots
Fields.Description: Does it consume bullets for the number of simultaneous shots?

Fields.Name: Can Lock-on
Fields.Description: Allows the bullet to be locked-on to.

Fields.Name: Can Reflect
Fields.Description: Can reflect bullet?

Fields.Name: Deflection Type
Fields.Description: The deflection type for this projectile against other projectiles.

Fields.Name: Hit Shape Type
Fields.Description: The shape of the hit capsule used by the bullet.

Fields.Name: Random Creation: Radius
Fields.Description: The bullet spawn range used when the source type is set to spawn at random locations. In metres.

Fields.Name: Dynamically Created Asset
Fields.Description: The number of assets to generate dynamically. -1: Not generated. The asset number is the last 6 digits of the asset. Example: AEG999_999 = 999999

Fields.Name: Homing Start Delay
Fields.Description: The time that must pass once the bullet is created before the homing begins.

Fields.Name: Gravity: Before Acceleration Start
Fields.Description: Gravitational acceleration before acceleration start time elapses. In metres per second ^ 2

Fields.Name: Gravity: After Acceleration Start
Fields.Description: Gravitational acceleration after acceleration start time elapses. In metres per second ^ 2

Fields.Name: Random Performance Rate
Fields.Description: Random rate for bullet acceleration and maximum tracking angle.

Fields.Name: Homing: Maximum Blur Angle (X-Axis)
Fields.Description: Lateral blur angle with respect to the direction of travel that occurs during acceleration. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Homing: Limit Angle
Fields.Description: If the angle between the target and the flight direction is greater than this, homing will end. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Homing: Blur Convergence Time
Fields.Description: Time from maximum blur angle to convergence. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Acceleration: End Time
Fields.Description: It will not accelerate after this time. Transition, falls according to 'afterAccelGravity'

Fields.Name: Can be Ricocheted
Fields.Description: Whether to ricochet once upon impact.

Fields.Name: Can be Intercepted
Fields.Description: Whether the bullet can be intercepted.

Fields.Name: Attack Particle Strength
Fields.Description: Attack strength [SFX]

Fields.Name: Attack Sound Strength
Fields.Description: Attack strength [Sound]

Fields.Name: Particle ID: Guard
Fields.Description: SFXID when guarding. -1 does not occur.

Fields.Name: Ricochet: Bullet Speed Change %
Fields.Description: Ratio of bullet speed after ricochet (1.0 means no change in speed than before ricochet)

Fields.Name: Ricochet: Gravity Acceleration
Fields.Description: Gravitational acceleration after ricochet. In metres ^ 2 per second.

Fields.Name: Proximity Fuse: Reaction Radius
Fields.Description: Distance at which the proximity fuse reacts to the character. Bullet expires post reaction. In metres.

Fields.Name: Shot Control: ID
Fields.Description: Shot Control parameter to use.

Fields.Name: Shot Control: Base Distance
Fields.Description: Diffusion reference distance

Fields.Name: Target Position Shot Control: ID
Fields.Description: Offset calculation for target position

Fields.Name: Particle ID: Acceleration
Fields.Description: SFX ID that is generated only once during acceleration. -1 not generate

Fields.Name: Particle ID: Post Acceleration
Fields.Description: SFX ID after acceleration. If this SFX ID is -1, continue flying with the SFX before acceleration.

Fields.Name: Homing: Minimum Blur Interval
Fields.Description: Minimum blur interval during homing. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Homing: Maximum Blur Interval
Fields.Description: Maximum blur interval during homing. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Homing: Maximum Blur Angle (Y-Axis)
Fields.Description: Vertical blur angle with respect to the direction of travel that occurs during acceleration. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Bullet Emitter Type
Fields.Description: Generator bullet type.

Fields.Name: Bullet Interval Emitter Type
Fields.Description: Interval generator bullet type.

Fields.Name: Particle ID: Interactive Smoke
Fields.Description: ID for specifying the interactive smoke to be generated.

Fields.Name: Initial Effective Force Angle
Fields.Description: Initial angle at which the force is effective [0,180] (180 is full circumference). In degrees.

Fields.Name: Maximum Effective Force Angle
Fields.Description: Maximum angle at which the force is valid [0,180] (180 is full circumference). In degrees.

Fields.Name: Effective Angle
Fields.Description: The angle from the front where the bullet hits is [deg] 0 or 180, making it all around. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Hit Radius: Minimum
Fields.Description: If you are closer to the bullet than this distance, the bullet will not hit.

Fields.Name: Hit Radius: Minimum (Map-only)
Fields.Description: If you are closer to the bullet than this distance, the bullet will not hit (for map-only).

Fields.Name: Pulse Barrier: Energy Consumption
Fields.Description: Energy consumed per second while deploying barrier.

Fields.Name: Pulse Barrier: Stamina Consumption
Fields.Description: Stamina consumed per second while deploying barrier.

Fields.Name: Hit Capsule: Initial Length
Fields.Description: Initial hit length. In metres.

Fields.Name: Hit Capsule: Maximum Length
Fields.Description: Maximum hit length. In metres.

Fields.Name: Hit Capsule: Initial Length (for Map)
Fields.Description: Initial hit length. In metres.

Fields.Name: Hit Capsule: Maximum Length (for Map)
Fields.Description: Maximum hit length. In metres.

Fields.Name: Hit Capsule: Length Expansion TIme
Fields.Description: Time for the capsule length to expand from initial to maximum. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Hit Capsule: Initial Radius
Fields.Description: Initial hit thickness. In metres.

Fields.Name: Hit Capsule: Maximum Radius
Fields.Description: Maximum hit thickness. In metres.

Fields.Name: Hit Capsule: Initial Radius (for Map)
Fields.Description: Initial hit thickness. In metres.

Fields.Name: Hit Capsule: Maximum Radius (for Map)
Fields.Description: Maximum hit thickness. In metres.

Fields.Name: Hit Capsule: Radius Expansion Time
Fields.Description: Time for the capsule radius to expand from initial to maximum. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Hit Capsule: Initial Size Delay
Fields.Description: Time for which the hit capsule is kept at its initial length and radius.

Fields.Name: Hit Count
Fields.Description: Number of hits (for characters)

Fields.Name: Hit Count (for Map)
Fields.Description: Number of hits (for map)

Fields.Name: Child Emitter Position Type
Fields.Description: Where child bullet appears upon impact.

Fields.Name: Creation Restriction Group ID
Fields.Description: If it is 0, it is not used. If the upper limit is reached when creating bullets set to the same group ID, the bullets will not be created. (Bullets created synchronously on the network will come out regardless)

Fields.Name: Hit Interval
Fields.Description: Hit interval (for characters). In seconds.

Fields.Name: Hit Interval (for Map)
Fields.Description: Hit interval (for characters). In seconds.

Fields.Name: Pulse Barrier: Absorption %
Fields.Description: Reduction rate of damage received during barrier deployment. 100 means all cuts

Fields.Name: Pulse Barrier: Impact Type
Fields.Description: Behavior when hitting the barrier. Set to the bullet that attacks the barrier.

Fields.Name: Shooting Target Type
Fields.Description: Affects the display/hide of the lock sight, such as which character is locked and the location specified.

Fields.Name: Flare Impact Type
Fields.Description: Behavior when hit by a flare bullet.

Fields.Name: Particle ID: Pulse Barrier
Fields.Description: Set on the barrier side. Sfx that always occurs at the position of the bullet when it is parallel to itself (barrier).

Fields.Name: Particle ID: Impact on Pulse Barrier
Fields.Description: Set on the side of the bullet that hits the barrier. Sfx that occurs when leaving the barrier.

Fields.Name: Pulse Barrier Impact: Speed %
Fields.Description: Value applied to the speed of the bullet when it hits the barrier (setting on the barrier side)

Fields.Name: Pulse Barrier Impact: Minimum Speed
Fields.Description: Minimum speed of the bullet after hitting the barrier (setting on the barrier side). In metres per second.

Fields.Name: Pulse Barrier Impact: Maximum Speed
Fields.Description: Maximum speed of the bullet after hitting the barrier (setting on the barrier side). In metres per second.

Fields.Name: Hit Radius: Expansion Delay (on Map Impact)
Fields.Description: How many seconds after hitting the map will it expand? Instant expansion at 0

Fields.Name: Impact Placement Type
Fields.Description: If ON, the bullet is fully buried. If OFF, then the placement is based on hit.

Fields.Name: Particle ID: Interception
Fields.Description: SfxId that changes when intercepting or being intercepted

Fields.Name: Particle ID: Waiting for Fuse Explosion
Fields.Description: SfxId that changes when it hits the map and waits for explosion due to delayed fuse.

Fields.Name: Pulse Barrier: Maximum Travel Duration
Fields.Description: Maximum time to continue along the barrier surface. Set as the attacker's bullet to the barrier. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Homing: Direction Interpolation Time after Start
Fields.Description: Warhead direction interpolation time after guidance starts

Fields.Name: Interception Hit: Size %
Fields.Description: Size factor on interception

Fields.Name: Particle ID: Additional Bullet
Fields.Description: Special effects: SFX generated from bullets when the status change type 'Bullet additional SFX generation' is applied to the character.

Fields.Name: Flare: Effective Radius
Fields.Description: Distance that affects other bullets when the attach effect type is FNR flare. In metres.

Fields.Name: Upward Correction based on Shooter Speed
Fields.Description: Upward correction magnification of the shooter's speed added to the initial velocity of the bullet.

Fields.Name: Downward Correction based on Shooter Speed
Fields.Description: Downward correction magnification of the shooter's speed added to the initial velocity of the bullet.

Fields.Name: Forward Correction based on Shooter Speed
Fields.Description: Forward correction magnification of the shooter's speed added to the initial velocity of the bullet.

Fields.Name: Reload Interval
Fields.Description: Interval between one shot and the next shot. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Firing: Initial Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: Dummy Polygon ID used on firing.

Fields.Name: Firing: End Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: Dummy Polygon ID used on firing.

Fields.Name: Particle ID: Muzzle Flash
Fields.Description: Muzzle Sfx ID when firing.

Fields.Name: Cartridge: Initial Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: ID of cartridge dummy polygon

Fields.Name: Cartridge: Particle ID
Fields.Description: Cartridge Sfx ID

Fields.Name: Firing: Camera Rumble ID
Fields.Description: ID of shaking when shooting

Fields.Name: Shoot Interval
Fields.Description: The interval at which the projectile is emitted. Applied when generated via the TAE Bullet Behavior event. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Blast Generation: Ray Cast Distance
Fields.Description: Raycast distance to the blast generated along with the muzzle

Fields.Name: Number of Consecutive Shots
Fields.Description: Number of times to fire continuously. The total number of bullets fired is the number of simultaneous shots x the number of consecutive shots.

Fields.Name: Route Search ID
Fields.Description: Parameter ID for cost calculation when searching for homing target.

Fields.Name: Vertical Firing Angle: Minimum
Fields.Description: Minimum launch angle. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Vertical Firing Angle: Maximum
Fields.Description: Maximum launch angle. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Initial Velocity: Minimum
Fields.Description: The minimum initial velocity the bullet can have.

Fields.Name: Initial Velocity: Maximum
Fields.Description: The maximum initial velocity the bullet can have.

Fields.Name: Route Search Interval
Fields.Description: Update interval for navigation volume path search for homing target. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Interval Emitter: Max Count
Fields.Description: Maximum number of bullets when making them at regular intervals, 0 = unlimited

Fields.Name: Horizontal Capsule: Initial Roll Angle
Fields.Description: Rotation angle of horizontal capsule. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Route Search Time
Fields.Description: This is the time to perform a path search. After this time has elapsed, the path search will no longer be performed. (-1 is infinite). In seconds.

Fields.Name: Disable Route Search below this Distance
Fields.Description: If the distance to the homing target becomes less than this value during path search movement, disable path following and move directly.

Fields.Name: Particle ID: Thruster
Fields.Description: ID of SFX to generate (-1 does not generate thruster)

Fields.Name: Thruster Particle Generation Position Ratio
Fields.Description: Ratio to the radius of the hit

Fields.Name: Reflection: Stop Speed Limit
Fields.Description: Speed ​​at which reflection stops, stops if reflection speed is below the set value. In metres per second.

Fields.Name: Reflection: Stop Angle Limit
Fields.Description: Normal angle to determine the speed at which it no longer reflects, the upward direction is 0 (90 is a vertical wall, 180 is also a ceiling). In degrees.

Fields.Name: Firing: Rotation (Z-Axis)
Fields.Description: Specify how many times to rotate in the Z-axis direction when launching a projectile.

Fields.Name: Interception Durability
Fields.Description:
-1: Collision but not shot down (only sucks the bullet)
0: Shot down regardless of the interception attack power of the collision target
1+: Subtracted by the interception attack power of the collision target, shot down at 0

Fields.Name: Interception Power
Fields.Description:
0: Only shoot down bullets with durability value 0
1+: Subtract the interception durability value of the collision target

Fields.Name: Energy Consumption
Fields.Description: EN consumption when shooting

Fields.Name: Thruster: Minimum Generation Interval
Fields.Description: Minimum time between firing missile thrusters. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Thruster: Maximum Generation Interval
Fields.Description: Maximum time between firing missile thrusters. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Firing: Rotation Interval (Z-Axis)
Fields.Description: When firing multiple projectiles, specify the interval at which to fire (Z-axis). In degrees.

Fields.Name: Funnel: Think Delay
Fields.Description: Delay before the funnel think starts.

Fields.Name: Firing: Max Rotation Random Value (Z-Axis)
Fields.Description: Upper limit of firing Z-axis rotation random number (0 to 360)

Fields.Name: Firing: Angle
Fields.Description: In degrees.

Fields.Name: Missle Lock: Enable Count
Fields.Description: If the lock count number is less than the specified value, firing will not be possible.

Fields.Name: Backward Correction based on Shooter Speed
Fields.Description: Backward correction magnification of the shooter's speed added to the initial velocity of the bullet.

Fields.Name: Sideways Correction based on Shooter Speed
Fields.Description: Sideways correction magnification of the shooter's speed added to the initial velocity of the bullet.

Fields.Name: Animation ID of Dynamic Asset
Fields.Description: Animation ID of the dynamically generated asset. -1: No animation

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff: Kinetic - Decay Time
Fields.Description: The time it takes to decay to 100% after the decay distance.

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff: Energy - Decay Time
Fields.Description: The time it takes to decay to 100% after the decay distance.

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff: Explosive - Decay Time
Fields.Description: The time it takes to decay to 100% after the decay distance.

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff: Coral - Decay Time
Fields.Description: The time it takes to decay to 100% after the decay distance.

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff: Dark - Decay Time
Fields.Description: The time it takes to decay to 100% after the decay distance.

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff: Stamina - Decay Time
Fields.Description: The time it takes to decay to 100% after the decay distance.

Fields.Name: Damage Falloff: Knockback - Decay Time
Fields.Description: The time it takes to decay to 100% after the decay distance.

Fields.Name: Firing: Vertical Compensation Angle
Fields.Description: Shooting compensation angle vertical. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Is Guard Judgment inherited by Child Bullet on Direct Hit
Fields.Description: Do you want to inherit the guard formation status in the case of a direct hit?

Fields.Name: Follow Type
Fields.Description: Affects bullet position and behavior.

Fields.Name: When to Generate Dynamic Asset
Fields.Description: Timing to generate the dynamic asset.

Fields.Name: Prediction Shoot: Enable Speed Type
Fields.Description: Speed ​​type used in predictive shooting distance-based correction function

Fields.Name: Prediction Shoot: Correction Coefficient
Fields.Description: Correction coefficient used in distance-based correction function of predictive shooting

Fields.Name: Curved Firing: Target Offset Range (Z-Axis)
Fields.Description: Forward and backward offset of the impact position for curved shots. Shifts the target position toward the front or back during firing and homing. In metres.

Fields.Name: Curved Firing: Target Offset Range (X-Axis)
Fields.Description: Left and right offset of the impact position for curved shots. Shifts the target position toward the front or back during firing and homing. In metres.

Fields.Name: Firing: Target Offset (Z-Axis)
Fields.Description: Front and rear offset of impact position. Shifts the target position forward and backward during firing and homing.

Fields.Name: Firing: Target Offset (X-Axis)
Fields.Description: Left and right offset of impact position. Shifts the target position left and right during firing and homing. In metres.

Fields.Name: Firing: Firing Roll Angle (Z-Axis)
Fields.Description: Additional angle in drilling direction (Z axis). In degrees.

Fields.Name: Firing: Firing Roll Angle Interval (Z-Axis)
Fields.Description: When firing multiple projectiles, specify the interval at which to fire (Z-axis). In degrees.

Fields.Name: Firing: Firing Roll Angle - Random Max (Z-Axis)
Fields.Description: Upper limit of firing torsion angle random number (0 to 360)

Fields.Name: Firing: Camera Vibration ID
Fields.Description: Camera vibration parameter ID at the time of occurrence.

Fields.Name: On Hit: Camera Vibration ID
Fields.Description: Camera vibration parameter ID at the time of impact.

Fields.Name: Blast Distance: Attenuation Correction
Fields.Description: Correction calculation graph parameter ID for attenuating attack power depending on distance

Fields.Name: Sustained Performance Distance
Fields.Description: Guaranteed performance up to this distance. Affects bullet acceleration and maximum tracking angle.

Fields.Name: Ricochet: Distance
Fields.Description: Standard value for ricocheting distance. In metres.

Fields.Name: Particle ID: Ricochet
Fields.Description: SFX ID when ricocheting. -1 does not occur.

Fields.Name: Asset Penetration Power
Fields.Description: If the asset parameter's 'penetrateDef' is less than this value, it will penetrate.

Fields.Name: Orient Muzzle Particles in Firing Direction
Fields.Description: Should the muzzle SFX be directed in a direction that takes into account predictive firing and target position offset?

Fields.Name: Launch Condition Type: Guard
Fields.Description: Specify guard conditions to determine whether a bullet is generated when a bullet hits or life expires.

Fields.Name: Cartridge: End Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: ID of cartridge end dummy polygon.

Fields.Name: Homing Follow %: Minimum Time
Fields.Description: Time of minimum homing for change in homing with time.

Fields.Name: Homing Follow %: Maximum Time
Fields.Description: Time of maximum homing for change in homing with time.

Fields.Name: Homing Follow %: Minimum Time Follow %
Fields.Description: Homing when the change in homing due to time is less than the minimum time.

Fields.Name: Homing Follow %: Maximum Time Follow %
Fields.Description: Homing when the change in homing due to time is less than the maximum time.

Fields.Name: Prediction Shoot: Distance Coefficient
Fields.Description: A factor applied to the distance between the target and the predicted position for predictive shooting.

Fields.Name: Prediction Shoot: Max Distance Limit
Fields.Description: Maximum distance multiplied by predicted distance factor.

Fields.Name: Follow Ground: Maximum Slope Angle
Fields.Description: Maximum angle of slope that can be climbed when a bullet follows the ground. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Alert Display Type
Fields.Description: HUD alert display type.

Fields.Name: Alert Classification
Fields.Description: HUD alert level.

Fields.Name: Recoil Blur: Bullet Scatter Type
Fields.Description: Bullet dispersion method using attack recoil blur.

Fields.Name: Follow Ground: Ignored Height Step Distance
Fields.Description: The height of the step to ignore when the bullet follows the ground. In metres.

Fields.Name: Follow Ground: Kept Altitude
Fields.Description: Height above the ground to maintain when the bullet follows the ground. In metres.

Fields.Name: Goal Condition Distance
Fields.Description: If it gets this close to the target distance, it will end its life.

Fields.Name: Turning Speed toward Target
Fields.Description: The speed at which the bullet itself turns toward the target (-1 for normal turning control). In degrees per second.

Fields.Name: Recoil Blur: Minimum Blur Accumulation %
Fields.Description: Recoil blur accumulation ratio that maintains the initial launch angle value

Fields.Name: Recoil Blur: Maximum Blur Accumulation %
Fields.Description: Recoil blur accumulation ratio that maintains the maximum firing angle.

Fields.Name: Recoil Blur: Horizontal Launch Angle - Random Number: Minimum Angle
Fields.Description: Launch angle random number initial value. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Recoil Blur: Horizontal Launch Angle - Random Number: Maximum Angle
Fields.Description: Launch angle random number maximum value. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Recoil Blur: Vertical Launch Angle - Random Number: Minimum Angle
Fields.Description: Launch angle random number initial value. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Recoil Blur: Vertical Launch Angle - Random Number: Maximum Angle
Fields.Description: Launch angle random number maximum value. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Recoil Blur: Apply Correction Graph to Blur %
Fields.Description: Using the vertical axis (magnification from 0 to 1) of the correction calculation graph (861), find the launch angle as follows.

Fields.Name: Recoil Blur: Random Number Distribution
Fields.Description: How bullet dispersion is biased due to attack recoil blur

Fields.Name: Continue Duration after Parent Expiration
Fields.Description: Should the lifespan be counted after the parent bullet disappears?

Fields.Name: Maintain Parent Position before Acceleration
Fields.Description: Do you want to change the posture before acceleration to the parent posture?

Fields.Name: Distance Duration
Fields.Description: The flight distance over which a projectile can continue to exist (-1 = infinite).

Fields.Name: Duration % after Parent Expiration
Fields.Description: Lifespan rate after parent bullet disappears

Fields.Name: Velocity Correction after Acceleration
Fields.Description: Velocity vector correction time after acceleration. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Forward Brake Correction before Acceleration
Fields.Description: Directional braking before acceleration. In metres per second ^ 2

Fields.Name: Cartridge: Delay betwen Fire and Ejection
Fields.Description: Delay time between firing and shell ejection

Fields.Name: Cartridge: Behavior ID
Fields.Description: Cartridge behavior ID

Fields.Name: Cartridge: Continuous Generation Interval
Fields.Description: Generation interval time when cartridges are generated continuously. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Cartridge: Count
Fields.Description: Number of cartridges generated per dummy polygon ID.

Fields.Name: Blast Distance: Attenuation Correction Type
Fields.Description: Correct calculation graph parameter type for attenuating attack power by distance.

Fields.Name: Attach Particle Condition Type
Fields.Description: Specify attach guard conditions to determine whether a bullet is generated when a bullet hits or life expires.

Fields.Name: Inherit Target for Child Bullet
Fields.Description: Should shooting targets such as funnels be transferred to child bullets?

Fields.Name: Enable Lag Reduction for Direct Shot
Fields.Description: Enable lag reduction function for direct shots

Fields.Name: Ignore Secondary Hit if Parent Hits
Fields.Description: Ignore future hits after the parent bullet hits.

Fields.Name: Is Locally Generated
Fields.Description: Is a locally generated bullet.

Fields.Name: Delete Bullet after Generated Asset is Destroyed
Fields.Description: Should the bullet be deleted if the following asset is broken?

Fields.Name: Ricochet: Duration after Hit
Fields.Description: Bullet life time after ricochet. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Particle ID: End Ricochet
Fields.Description: SFX ID when ricochet disappears. -1 does not occur. Movement will not be carried over.

Fields.Name: Particle ID: Expiration
Fields.Description: SFX ID at the time of disappearance. -1 does not occur. Movement will not be carried over.

Fields.Name: Brake: Start Time
Fields.Description: The time from when the bullet occurs to when the brakes begin. -1 with no brake. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Brake: End Time
Fields.Description: The time from when the bullet occurs to when the brake ends. -1 to permanent brake. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Brake: Performance
Fields.Description: In metres per second ^ 2

Fields.Name: Muzzle Flash: Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: SFX dummy poly ID of muzzle when firing

Fields.Name: Secondary Muzzle Flash: Particle ID
Fields.Description: Specify effects that are not related to the muzzle, such as missile backfire or exhaust heat smoke.

Fields.Name: Secondary Muzzle Flash: Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: Dummy poly specification that causes the above to occur. -1 specification makes it the same as the muzzle

Fields.Name: Random Max Duration for Duration
Fields.Description: Random maximum value added to distance lifetime
